headline: XLK Charges One Penny Less Than VGT Per $100 Invested. Here Is Why That Is Not the Reason to Choose It.
summary: Competing asset managers tend to offer very similar ETF lineups, especially when it comes to sector funds. Whether you’re looking at Vanguard, iShares, or State Street, you’ll usually find a full set of ETFs covering all 11 official sector classifications.
